# Security Policy

Report private security or vulnerability issues to
[security@briefloop.ai](mailto:security@briefloop.ai).

Please include the affected version, reproduction steps, and the smallest safe
example that demonstrates the issue. Do not open a public issue for sensitive
vulnerability details.

This contact channel does not create a service-level agreement, delivery
approval, release authority, legal advice, compliance advice, investment advice,
or semantic-proof claim.

For the broader security and privacy boundary, see
[docs/security.md](../docs/security.md).
